source.note: real seeded app via apps-container + reverse tunnel; deterministic container grade

task.en: Open TableFind, the restaurant reservation app at http://localhost:3008 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Alfredo's Pizza Cafe has no open tables, so join its waitlist for a party of 4 on July 20, 2026 at 8:00 PM, noting that you'd like a window seat.
